sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ مَعًا لِإِنْجَازِ الْمَشْرُوعِ الْكَبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici rade zajedno kako bi završili veliki projekat.
sentences.translationEn: The employees work together to complete the big project.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ زَمِيلَهُ فِي الْمَهَامِّ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba pomaže svom kolegi u teškim zadacima.
sentences.translationEn: Each person helps their colleague with difficult tasks.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ يَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ أَسْهَلَ وَأَسْرَعَ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja čini posao lakšim i bržim za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation makes work easier and faster for everyone.
